Journal.Title: Frontiers in sports and active living

Article.ArticleTitle: Editorial: Highlights in sport and exercise nutrition 2021/22.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: North Carolina Research Campus, Human Performance Laboratory, Department of Biology, Appalachian State University, Boone, NC, United States.
WHISPA High Performance Sport New Zealand, Auckland, New Zealand.
Department of Nutrition and Healthcare Management, Appalachian State University, Boone, NC, United States.
Department of Nutrition and Food Science, School of Pharmacy, University of Granada, Granada, Spain.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: The authors declare that the research was conducted in the absence of any commercial or financial relationships that could be construed as a potential conflict of interest.
